patterns.component_pattern: Components use shadcn/ui Card, Badge, cn() for styling. Size variants via object maps. Color classes based on score thresholds.
patterns.action_pattern: Server actions use 'use server' directive, createClient from supabase, and return typed Result objects with success/error.
patterns.query_pattern: Query functions are async, throw on error, return null for no data. Use supabase.from().select().eq().order().limit().
patterns.type_pattern: Types are defined in lib/types/analytics.ts for analytics and lib/supabase/database.types.ts for database rows

existing_implementations.description: Reliability score system already exists with star-based display, badge variants, score breakdown (attendance/punctuality/rating), and score history. The score_history component has trend badges (TrendingUp/TrendingDown/Minus) that show change between entries.
